properties.name: x
properties.description: X coordinate of the event relative to the main frame's viewport in CSS pixels.

properties.name: y
properties.description:
Y coordinate of the event relative to the main frame's viewport in CSS pixels. 0 refers to
the top of the viewport and Y increases as it proceeds towards the bottom of the viewport.

properties.name: radiusX
properties.description: X radius of the touch area (default: 1.0).

properties.name: radiusY
properties.description: Y radius of the touch area (default: 1.0).

properties.name: tangentialPressure
properties.description: The normalized tangential pressure, which has a range of [-1,1] (default: 0).

properties.name: tiltX
properties.description: The plane angle between the Y-Z plane and the plane containing both the stylus axis and the Y axis, in degrees of the range [-90,90], a positive tiltX is to the right (default: 0)

properties.name: tiltY
properties.description: The plane angle between the X-Z plane and the plane containing both the stylus axis and the X axis, in degrees of the range [-90,90], a positive tiltY is towards the user (default: 0).

properties.name: twist
properties.description: The clockwise rotation of a pen stylus around its own major axis, in degrees in the range [0,359] (default: 0).

properties.name: id
properties.description: Identifier used to track touch sources between events, must be unique within an event.

types.description: UTC time in seconds, counted from January 1, 1970.

properties.name: mimeType
properties.description: Mime type of the dragged data.

properties.name: data
properties.description:
Depending of the value of `mimeType`, it contains the dragged link,
text, HTML markup or any other data.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Title associated with a link. Only valid when `mimeType` == "text/uri-list".

properties.name: baseURL
properties.description:
Stores the base URL for the contained markup. Only valid when `mimeType`
== "text/html".

properties.name: files
properties.description: List of filenames that should be included when dropping

properties.name: dragOperationsMask
properties.description: Bit field representing allowed drag operations. Copy = 1, Link = 2, Move = 16

commands.name: dispatchDragEvent
commands.description: Dispatches a drag event into the page.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the drag event.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate of the event relative to the main frame's viewport in CSS pixels.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description:
Y coordinate of the event relative to the main frame's viewport in CSS pixels. 0 refers to
the top of the viewport and Y increases as it proceeds towards the bottom of the viewport.

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description:
Bit field representing pressed modifier keys. Alt=1, Ctrl=2, Meta/Command=4, Shift=8
(default: 0).

commands.name: dispatchKeyEvent
commands.description: Dispatches a key event to the page.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the key event.

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description:
Bit field representing pressed modifier keys. Alt=1, Ctrl=2, Meta/Command=4, Shift=8
(default: 0).

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Time at which the event occurred.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description:
Text as generated by processing a virtual key code with a keyboard layout. Not needed for
for `keyUp` and `rawKeyDown` events (default: "")

parameters.name: unmodifiedText
parameters.description:
Text that would have been generated by the keyboard if no modifiers were pressed (except for
shift). Useful for shortcut (accelerator) key handling (default: "").

parameters.name: keyIdentifier
parameters.description: Unique key identifier (e.g., 'U+0041') (default: "").

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Unique DOM defined string value for each physical key (e.g., 'KeyA') (default: "").

parameters.name: key
parameters.description:
Unique DOM defined string value describing the meaning of the key in the context of active
modifiers, keyboard layout, etc (e.g., 'AltGr') (default: "").

parameters.name: windowsVirtualKeyCode
parameters.description: Windows virtual key code (default: 0).

parameters.name: nativeVirtualKeyCode
parameters.description: Native virtual key code (default: 0).

parameters.name: autoRepeat
parameters.description: Whether the event was generated from auto repeat (default: false).

parameters.name: isKeypad
parameters.description: Whether the event was generated from the keypad (default: false).

parameters.name: isSystemKey
parameters.description: Whether the event was a system key event (default: false).

parameters.name: location
parameters.description:
Whether the event was from the left or right side of the keyboard. 1=Left, 2=Right (default:
0).

parameters.name: commands
parameters.description:
Editing commands to send with the key event (e.g., 'selectAll') (default: []).
These are related to but not equal the command names used in `document.execCommand` and NSStandardKeyBindingResponding.
See https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:third_party/blink/renderer/core/editing/commands/editor_command_names.h for valid command names.

commands.name: insertText
commands.description:
This method emulates inserting text that doesn't come from a key press,
for example an emoji keyboard or an IME.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text to insert.

commands.name: imeSetComposition
commands.description:
This method sets the current candidate text for IME.
Use imeCommitComposition to commit the final text.
Use imeSetComposition with empty string as text to cancel composition.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text to insert

parameters.name: selectionStart
parameters.description: selection start

parameters.name: selectionEnd
parameters.description: selection end

parameters.name: replacementStart
parameters.description: replacement start

parameters.name: replacementEnd
parameters.description: replacement end

commands.name: dispatchMouseEvent
commands.description: Dispatches a mouse event to the page.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the mouse event.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate of the event relative to the main frame's viewport in CSS pixels.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description:
Y coordinate of the event relative to the main frame's viewport in CSS pixels. 0 refers to
the top of the viewport and Y increases as it proceeds towards the bottom of the viewport.

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description:
Bit field representing pressed modifier keys. Alt=1, Ctrl=2, Meta/Command=4, Shift=8
(default: 0).

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Time at which the event occurred.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: Mouse button (default: "none").

parameters.name: buttons
parameters.description:
A number indicating which buttons are pressed on the mouse when a mouse event is triggered.
Left=1, Right=2, Middle=4, Back=8, Forward=16, None=0.

parameters.name: clickCount
parameters.description: Number of times the mouse button was clicked (default: 0).

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: The normalized pressure, which has a range of [0,1] (default: 0).

parameters.name: tangentialPressure
parameters.description: The normalized tangential pressure, which has a range of [-1,1] (default: 0).

parameters.name: tiltX
parameters.description: The plane angle between the Y-Z plane and the plane containing both the stylus axis and the Y axis, in degrees of the range [-90,90], a positive tiltX is to the right (default: 0).

parameters.name: tiltY
parameters.description: The plane angle between the X-Z plane and the plane containing both the stylus axis and the X axis, in degrees of the range [-90,90], a positive tiltY is towards the user (default: 0).

parameters.name: twist
parameters.description: The clockwise rotation of a pen stylus around its own major axis, in degrees in the range [0,359] (default: 0).

parameters.name: deltaX
parameters.description: X delta in CSS pixels for mouse wheel event (default: 0).

parameters.name: deltaY
parameters.description: Y delta in CSS pixels for mouse wheel event (default: 0).

parameters.name: pointerType
parameters.description: Pointer type (default: "mouse").

commands.name: dispatchTouchEvent
commands.description: Dispatches a touch event to the page.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Type of the touch event. TouchEnd and TouchCancel must not contain any touch points, while
TouchStart and TouchMove must contains at least one.

parameters.name: touchPoints
parameters.description:
Active touch points on the touch device. One event per any changed point (compared to
previous touch event in a sequence) is generated, emulating pressing/moving/releasing points
one by one.

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description:
Bit field representing pressed modifier keys. Alt=1, Ctrl=2, Meta/Command=4, Shift=8
(default: 0).

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Time at which the event occurred.

commands.name: cancelDragging
commands.description: Cancels any active dragging in the page.

commands.name: emulateTouchFromMouseEvent
commands.description: Emulates touch event from the mouse event parameters.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the mouse event.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate of the mouse pointer in DIP.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate of the mouse pointer in DIP.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: Mouse button. Only "none", "left", "right" are supported.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Time at which the event occurred (default: current time).

parameters.name: deltaX
parameters.description: X delta in DIP for mouse wheel event (default: 0).

parameters.name: deltaY
parameters.description: Y delta in DIP for mouse wheel event (default: 0).

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description:
Bit field representing pressed modifier keys. Alt=1, Ctrl=2, Meta/Command=4, Shift=8
(default: 0).

parameters.name: clickCount
parameters.description: Number of times the mouse button was clicked (default: 0).

commands.name: setIgnoreInputEvents
commands.description: Ignores input events (useful while auditing page).

parameters.name: ignore
parameters.description: Ignores input events processing when set to true.

commands.name: setInterceptDrags
commands.description:
Prevents default drag and drop behavior and instead emits `Input.dragIntercepted` events.
Drag and drop behavior can be directly controlled via `Input.dispatchDragEvent`.

commands.name: synthesizePinchGesture
commands.description: Synthesizes a pinch gesture over a time period by issuing appropriate touch events.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate of the start of the gesture in CSS pixels.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate of the start of the gesture in CSS pixels.

parameters.name: scaleFactor
parameters.description: Relative scale factor after zooming (>1.0 zooms in, <1.0 zooms out).

parameters.name: relativeSpeed
parameters.description: Relative pointer speed in pixels per second (default: 800).

parameters.name: gestureSourceType
parameters.description:
Which type of input events to be generated (default: 'default', which queries the platform
for the preferred input type).

commands.name: synthesizeScrollGesture
commands.description: Synthesizes a scroll gesture over a time period by issuing appropriate touch events.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate of the start of the gesture in CSS pixels.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate of the start of the gesture in CSS pixels.

parameters.name: xDistance
parameters.description: The distance to scroll along the X axis (positive to scroll left).

parameters.name: yDistance
parameters.description: The distance to scroll along the Y axis (positive to scroll up).

parameters.name: xOverscroll
parameters.description:
The number of additional pixels to scroll back along the X axis, in addition to the given
distance.

parameters.name: yOverscroll
parameters.description:
The number of additional pixels to scroll back along the Y axis, in addition to the given
distance.

parameters.name: preventFling
parameters.description: Prevent fling (default: true).

parameters.name: speed
parameters.description: Swipe speed in pixels per second (default: 800).

parameters.name: gestureSourceType
parameters.description:
Which type of input events to be generated (default: 'default', which queries the platform
for the preferred input type).

parameters.name: repeatCount
parameters.description: The number of times to repeat the gesture (default: 0).

parameters.name: repeatDelayMs
parameters.description: The number of milliseconds delay between each repeat. (default: 250).

parameters.name: interactionMarkerName
parameters.description: The name of the interaction markers to generate, if not empty (default: "").

commands.name: synthesizeTapGesture
commands.description: Synthesizes a tap gesture over a time period by issuing appropriate touch events.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate of the start of the gesture in CSS pixels.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate of the start of the gesture in CSS pixels.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration between touchdown and touchup events in ms (default: 50).

parameters.name: tapCount
parameters.description: Number of times to perform the tap (e.g. 2 for double tap, default: 1).

parameters.name: gestureSourceType
parameters.description:
Which type of input events to be generated (default: 'default', which queries the platform
for the preferred input type).

events.name: dragIntercepted
events.description:
Emitted only when `Input.setInterceptDrags` is enabled. Use this data with `Input.dispatchDragEvent` to
restore normal drag and drop behavior.
